items.title: Deployment System - Deploy OpenClaw via single command
items.description: As a user, I can deploy OpenClaw via single command. Given a valid DigitalOcean account. When I run the deployment command. Then infrastructure is provisioned and accessible within 15 minutes.

items.title: Deployment System - Access running dashboard
items.description: As a user, I can access a running dashboard. Given deployment is complete. When I open the provided URL. Then I see system status and navigation options.

items.title: Sandbox Runtime - Run agents in isolated environments
items.description: As a user, I can run agents in isolated environments. Given an agent task. When the agent executes. Then it runs inside a container with restricted permissions.

items.title: Sandbox Runtime - Restrict filesystem access
items.description: As a user, I can restrict filesystem access. Given sandbox rules. When an agent accesses files. Then only allowed directories are accessible.

items.title: Sandbox Runtime - Control network access
items.description: As a user, I can control network access. Given network policy is defined. When agent attempts external call. Then request is allowed or blocked per policy.

items.title: Agent Execution Engine - Submit task to agent
items.description: As a user, I can submit a task to an agent. Given the dashboard. When I input a task. Then the agent begins execution.

items.title: Agent Execution Engine - Stop agent mid-execution
items.description: As a user, I can stop an agent mid-execution. Given an active agent. When I click stop. Then execution halts within 5 seconds.

items.title: Observability and Logs - View agent actions
items.description: As a user, I can view agent actions. Given an agent run. When I open logs. Then I see step-by-step actions.

items.title: Observability and Logs - See blocked actions
items.description: As a user, I can see blocked actions. Given sandbox enforcement. When an action is denied. Then it is logged with reason.

items.title: Sandbox Configuration UI - Edit sandbox rules in UI
items.description: As a user, I can edit sandbox rules in UI. Given settings panel. When I modify rules. Then new runs follow updated rules.

items.title: Preset Sandbox Profiles - Choose predefined sandbox levels
items.description: As a user, I can choose predefined sandbox levels. Given profile options. When I select one. Then rules are applied automatically.

items.title: Ansible-based OpenClaw DigitalOcean deployment
items.description: Deploy OpenClaw on DigitalOcean with Tailscale, Ansible, Docker sandboxing, monitoring (node-exporter), Grafana, backup via snapshots, and Makefile entrypoints.
